dept_ghmc_corporation_desc: Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation is responsible for civic administration across the Hyderabad metropolitan area.
dept_ghmc_zone_desc: Administrative zones within GHMC, each overseeing multiple wards for local governance.
dept_ghmc_ward_desc: Individual wards within GHMC, the basic unit of local representation with elected corporators.
dept_police_city_desc: Hyderabad City Police jurisdictions for law and order.
dept_election_pc_desc: Parliamentary constituencies electing Members of Parliament to the Lok Sabha.
dept_election_ac_desc: Assembly constituencies electing Members of Legislative Assembly to the Telangana Legislative Assembly.
dept_admin_district_desc: Revenue districts headed by District Collectors for general administration.
dept_admin_mandal_desc: Mandals headed by Mandal Revenue Officers for local revenue administration and land records.
dept_pincode_desc: Postal PIN code areas served by India Post offices.
